goals: 1. Complete correct engine — fix all GAPs, all choices policy-driven
2. Full policy control — every rng decision routes through PolicyCallback
3. Decouple engine/game_loop/policy/search per docs/architecture-refactoring.md tasks A-E
4. Train model that plays reasonable 8-10 turn games with itself (no blunders)
current_task: Tests green. Dispatching v5 AWR sweep + v4 PPO. Frame-context features pending Codex dispatch.
current_strategy: PPO v3 COMPLETE (iter200). Best = iter150, panel_avg_wr=0.481 (ussr=0.637, us=0.325). v56 BC still best combined at 0.492 (N=300). v5 AWR data collected: 52,876 rows from 3 models (v56, v3_iter50, v3_best), excluded us_bc (0% WR lesson). Next: AWR sweep on v5 data to find best architecture for v4 PPO warmstart. Frame-context features (FrameKind/budget/step_index) are the highest-leverage neural net gap — model sees ZERO frame context currently.
next_tasks: Start v5 AWR architecture sweep on data/awr_eval/v5_v3best_v1/ (52k rows) — compare gnn_side, control_feat, country_alloc, film variants
Start v4 PPO: warmstart from v3_best (iter150) scripted checkpoint; run 200 iterations
Dispatch frame-context features to Codex — add 8 scalars (FrameKind, source_card, budget_remaining, step_index) to nn_features.cpp; requires model re-script; 5-min progress instructions
Run post-fix Elo tournament: invalidate old ladder (pre-DEFCON-1-fix), re-run 6x6 round-robin at N=500/side on fixed engine with v56 as ~2015 anchor

ismcts_verdict.diagnosis: Value head trained on partial-info states gives poor estimates on determinized states.
ismcts_verdict.fix_required: Train separate value head on determinized states, or use heuristic rollouts. High effort, deferred.

codex_mcp_discovery.pattern: Call mcp__codex__codex directly from main session — no subagent needed. General-purpose bg agents also inherit MCP. Custom agent types do NOT.
codex_mcp_discovery.5min_progress: Always include in developer-instructions: 'Print a brief progress note every 5 minutes so the watchdog does not fire.'
